context: 2015 marked the debut of Spain's first unified PROMUSICAE chart combining streaming, downloads, and physical sales. Reggaeton and Latin urban music dominated, with Nicky Jam and Enrique Iglesias' 'El Perdón' becoming the song of the year. The chart reflected Spain's growing embrace of Latin urban sounds alongside global EDM and pop hits.

tracks.title: Lean On
tracks.artist: Major Lazer & DJ Snake ft. MØ
